items.title: Flows page layout rework
items.problem: Data dump, no narrative flow. Needs story structure like dashboard.
items.approach: Summary at top, group by flow direction, insight-first cards, cross-sector arrows

items.title: Watchlist first-principles redesign
items.problem: Just ticker list with prices. No context on why each ticker matters.
items.approach: Mini briefing card per ticker: sector membership, influence weight, options, connected features, regime context

items.title: Timeframe comparison visual
items.problem: User wants 5y vs 5w vs 5d side-by-side for any feature. Sparks pattern recognition.
items.approach: New TimeframeComparison component with 3-5 panels, mini charts, embeddable in Flows/Watchlist/standalone

items.title: LLM prompt optimization via orthogonality
items.problem: Truncating data to fit context window loses information. Should SELECT most informative points.
items.approach: Greedy orthogonal selection: pick highest |z|, remove correlated features, repeat. Max info per token.

items.title: Capital flow granularity
items.problem: Only shows current snapshot. Need timeframe selector, compare mode, flow attribution.
items.approach: Add 1W/1M/3M/6M/1Y selector, compare mode, subsector drill-down, historical replay slider

items.title: Context window fix
items.approach: Restart with --ctx-size 8192. RTX PRO 4000 24GB can handle it.
items.action: Edit systemd service or start script, restart llama-server

items.title: Hypothesis results UI
items.problem: 67 passed hypotheses in DB with no PWA visibility.
items.approach: Add tested hypotheses section to Discovery view with lag charts and promote button

user_preferences.favorite_feature: Capital Flow Analysis — keep generic view as default
user_preferences.wants: timeframe comparison for pattern recognition, weight sliders for tuning, orthogonal prompt selection
user_preferences.style: insight-first not data-first, narrative flow, actionable not informational
